# Cubic3D

> Professional FDM 3D printing service based in Nairobi, Kenya, serving customers nationwide.

## About

Cubic3D makes custom manufacturing accessible to individuals, students, and businesses across Kenya. We use FDM (Fused Deposition Modelling) technology to produce accurate, high-quality parts from your digital designs — with dimensional accuracy down to 0.02 mm. Every print is inspected before dispatch.

## Services

- **FDM 3D Printing**: Upload your STL file and receive a confirmed price quote. Most orders are ready within 2–5 business days. Pricing is weight-based (KES per gram of finished print).
- **3D Design**: We model objects from sketches, photos, or descriptions. Starting from KES 1,500.
- **3D Scanning**: We digitize physical objects into accurate 3D models for reproduction or modification. Starting from KES 1,500.

## Materials

PLA, PETG, ASA, ABS, TPU — each available in a range of colours.
Full material list with pricing: [Materials & Options](https://cubic3d.co.ke/materials/)

## Capabilities

- Dual extrusion (multi-colour and multi-material prints)
- Fine detail down to 0.02 mm layer height
- Print-in-place mechanisms (fully assembled out of the printer)
- Post-processing: sanding, priming, and surface finishing
- Hardware integration: embedded magnets, nuts, and threaded inserts

## How It Works

1. Upload your STL file at [Request a Print](https://cubic3d.co.ke/getting_started/upload/)
2. We analyse the file and send you a confirmed price.
3. Confirm and pay — payment is required before dispatch.
4. Receive your print, delivered countrywide across Kenya within 2–5 business days.

## Clients

We have worked with [Rensyl Integral](https://rensylintegral.com/), [Drygro](https://drygro.com/), [Kaiote](https://kaiote.io/), and [PCTL Automation](https://www.pctlautomation.com/).

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What file format is required?**
STL files are accepted. Most CAD tools ([Fusion 360](https://www.autodesk.com/products/fusion-360/), SolidWorks, Tinkercad, Blender) export STL directly.

**How long does printing take?**
2–5 business days after confirming the price. Complex or large prints may take longer.

**How is the price calculated?**
Based on the weight of the finished print in grams multiplied by the material's per-gram rate.

**Do you deliver outside Nairobi?**
Yes — we deliver countrywide across Kenya. Delivery fees depend on location and are included in the invoice.

**Can you help if I don't have a 3D file?**
Yes — we offer a 3D design service starting from KES 1,500. [Contact us](https://cubic3d.co.ke/contact/) with a sketch, photo, or description.

**What if my print doesn't come out right?**
We inspect every print before dispatch. If a quality issue is on our end, we reprint at no charge.
